error_signature: unable to bind success/cancel page in Stripe Checkout
title: Binding Success/Cancel Page in Stripe Checkout Fails
symptom: When attempting to bind a success or cancel page in Stripe Checkout, the provided URLs do not work as expected.
not_this_if: Using the dropdown menu method for page assignment
root_cause: The binding method requires a specific format for the URL, which includes the WeWeb page ID. Without this ID, the binding will not function correctly.
fix_steps: Click on 'Show dev information' to find the WeWeb page ID.
Use the format '[WeWebpageID]'/purchase_status?referral=Facebook' in the bind field.
Test the Stripe Checkout action again.
agent_instruction: Use the correct format with the WeWeb page ID in the bind field for Stripe Checkout.
